name: Atlassian
description: Rovo Dev (`acli rovodev`) and Teamwork Graph (`twg`) CLIs sharing one Atlassian account. Auth persists across rebuilds.

rovodev.description: Install acli (with the Rovo Dev agent).

instance.description: Atlassian site host (`yoursite.atlassian.net`); required by twg.

email.description: Atlassian account email; used with `apiToken` for non-interactive login.

apiToken.description: Atlassian API token (id.atlassian.com → Security → API tokens).

bitbucketToken.description: Optional Bitbucket app password; only needed for twg's Bitbucket commands.
